sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: Spin-Dash
special_mechanics.description: Sonic can perform a spin-dash on the ground to gain speed, retaining ability from prior Sonic games

special_mechanics.name: Mid-Air Spin
special_mechanics.description: Sonic can jump and spin in mid-air to defeat robots or hop on platforms

special_mechanics.name: Special Stages
special_mechanics.description: Camera shifts to behind Sonic as he runs down a preset path collecting rings while avoiding obstacles. Lose rings on collision with obstacles.

tier_notes: T2 empirical/qualitative data. Sonic 3D Blast uses isometric 2D perspective with pre-rendered 3D sprites. Core movement mechanics retained from prior Sonic games but specific physics parameters (acceleration, gravity, jump velocity) are not documented in available sources. Game design draws from Donkey Kong Country and Sonic Labyrinth. Controls and pace have been subject to retrospective criticism.
